title: No Coming To God Without Christ.
content:
Good and great God! how should I fear
    To come to Thee if Christ not there!
    Could I but think He would not be
    Present to plead my cause for me,
    To hell I'd rather run than I
    Would see Thy face and He not by.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "No Coming To God Without Christ."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
